user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Aesop
Product type: Resurrection hand wash
Tone: refined, natural, minimalist
Visual style: Clean, muted earth tones with simple, elegant packaging emphasizing natural ingredients and understated luxury.
Conceptual technique: sensory experience storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Hands Down, The Best Wash.
brief.caption: A serene bathroom scene featuring a minimalist Aesop hand wash bottle on a stone countertop, surrounded by natural elements like sprigs of eucalyptus and smooth river stones, with soft morning light filtering through a linen curtain.
brief.visual_style: Clean, muted earth tones with simple, elegant packaging emphasizing natural ingredients and understated luxury.
brief.typography_style: Elegant serif with subtle thin strokes, luxurious yet approachable
brief.color_scheme: sage green, soft beige, and muted stone grey
